englishDefinitions: A person or thing associated with lips; a rare slang or dialect word.
A term with very limited standard usage, sometimes used informally for someone who talks back.
persianTranslation: واژه‌ای عامیانه و نادر؛ کسی که زیادی جواب‌پس‌می‌دهد
examples: I heard the old slang word lipper in a movie, but I rarely see it used.
He was called a lipper for always talking back.
The meaning of lipper can vary by region and context.
